task_description: Create a premium Symmetry-like mega navigation section for Shopify Dawn theme. Completely independent from the existing header.liquid. Features: per-item color customization (SALE in red with red hover underline), multi-column mega dropdowns with promo images, hover underline animations, mobile drawer with accordion menus, and 35-50 mn_ prefixed settings for detailed Customizer control. Inspired by TheJacketMaker.com navigation structure.
